comment: The ONE version-controlled replay-runtime definition (plan replay-corpus-gate-2026-07 Item 4). Consumed by the deterministic-evidence workflow, test-backend, and the live nightly workflow so trusted evidence and the merge gate never evaluate identical fixtures under different Node patches (fake-timer/scheduler behaviour is patch-sensitive). The container digest is the AUTHORITATIVE deterministic-evidence + live-lane environment; test-backend's corpus step runs the same exact Node via setup-node on the floating ubuntu-latest runner — the documented accident-grade OS-parity residual (a blocking-lane failure that does not reproduce in the pinned container is triaged as environment drift, not fixture regression). A Node-patch or container-digest change resets advisory GREEN chains (behaviour_fingerprint component).
